items.title: Parents Sue Procter & Gamble (PG) Over Kids’ Crest Toothpaste, Claim Packaging Misleads Consumers
items.description: The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) is one of the best dividend stocks to buy. A Reuters report dated November 3 disclosed a court ruling that Procter & Gamble must respond to claims regarding Kids’ Crest packaging, which misleads parents about how much toothpaste kids should use. On October 31, Jorge Alonso, the American district […]

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Up On Shutdown Deal; Cathie Wood Loads Up On This (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones rose on the stock market today. Speaker Johnson made a shutdown move. Cathie Wood bought some stocks and Palantir jumped.

items.title: Lamarina, The Cove & Cucina: 5th Palm Beach CorpGov Forum Social Events
items.description: CorpGov, IPO Edge and PE Edge are pleased to share photographs of the social events tied to the 5th Palm Beach CorpGov Forum on Wednesday, Nov. 5-6. items.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Jumps On Shutdown Hopes; This Stock Gets Support (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index was up on the stock market today as government shutdown hopes rose. Bitcoin rallied while Nvidia and Palantir stock jumped.

items.title: PG Sees North America Slowdown, China Rebound: Can It Realign Growth?
items.description: Procter & Gamble sees slowing North American demand but rising momentum in China, as innovation and premiumization fuel its regional rebound.
